headline: IBM AI And Quantum Push With MIT And Dallara Tests Earnings Potential
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) is rolling out a set of enterprise-focused AI announcements tied to its IBM Think 2026 event, centered on deployment for large organizations. The company is highlighting new adoption trends such as the rise of Chief AI Officers in the C-suite, based on a global study of corporate leaders. IBM is also expanding partnerships with MIT and Dallara to pair quantum computing and AI for research and advanced engineering use cases. For investors watching enterprise software and...

headline: Think 2026: IBM Delivers the Blueprint for the AI Operating Model as the AI Divide Widens
summary: Today, at its annual Think conference, IBM (NYSE: IBM) announced its most comprehensive expansion of enterprise AI and hybrid cloud management capabilities to date. Products and capabilities unveiled today include the next generation of IBM watsonx Orchestrate for multi-agent orchestration, IBM Confluent to bring real-time data to AI, IBM Concert platform for intelligent operations, and IBM Sovereign Core for operational independence.

content.title: Think 2026: IBM Delivers the Blueprint for the AI Operating Model as the AI Divide Widens

headline: Think 2026: IBM Makes Digital Sovereignty Operational with General Availability of IBM Sovereign Core
summary: At Think 2026, IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced the general availability of IBM Sovereign Core, a new software platform designed to help organizations build and operate AI-ready sovereign environments and verify their control — giving enterprises and governments an end-to-end approach to digital sovereignty.

content.title: Think 2026: IBM Makes Digital Sovereignty Operational with General Availability of IBM Sovereign Core
content.summary: At Think 2026, IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced the general availability of IBM Sovereign Core, a new software platform designed to help organizations build and operate AI-ready sovereign environments and verify their control — giving enterprises and governments an end-to-end approach to digital sovereignty.

headline: Cleveland Clinic, RIKEN, and IBM Model a 12,635-Atom Protein - the Largest Known to Be Simulated with Quantum Computers
summary: Scientists at Cleveland Clinic, RIKEN, and IBM (NYSE: IBM) have used IBM quantum computers and two of the world's most powerful supercomputers to simulate protein complexes spanning up to 12,635 atoms. These are the largest-known simulations of biologically meaningful molecules performed with quantum hardware yet, and signal that quantum computers are maturing into useful scientific tools which can help solve fundamental problems in biology, chemistry, and life sciences.

content.title: Cleveland Clinic, RIKEN, and IBM Model a 12,635-Atom Protein - the Largest Known to Be Simulated with Quantum Computers
content.summary: Scientists at Cleveland Clinic, RIKEN, and IBM (NYSE: IBM) have used IBM quantum computers and two of the world's most powerful supercomputers to simulate protein complexes spanning up to 12,635 atoms. These are the largest-known simulations of biologically meaningful molecules performed with quantum hardware yet, and signal that quantum computers are maturing into useful scientific tools which can help solve fundamental problems in biology, chemistry, and life sciences.

thumbnail.caption: Researchers at IBM, Cleveland Clinic, and RIKEN used quantum-centric supercomputing to model the protein trypsin, a 12,635-atom protein and the largest known to be simulated with quantum computers. (Credit: IBM, Cleveland Clinic, and RIKEN)

headline: HSBC Upgrades International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) on Quantum Business Valuation
summary: ​International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) provides hybrid cloud and artificial intelligence solutions, along with consulting services. The company is also engaged in quantum computing as it develops proprietary superconducting hardware and a sophisticated software ecosystem built around the Qiskit framework.
